title: Saleha Hasham
content:
People.ContactEmail shasham@mtiplus.ca
- University of Windsor
- University of Detroit Mercy
Saleha is an associate in our Immigration Group in Toronto.  Her practice focuses on U.S. immigration law.
She advises businesses of all sizes - from large multinational organizations to start-ups, scale-ups,  and other fast-growing business on U.S. immigration compliance, investor visas, temporary non-immigrant work permits as well as immigrant matters, including green cards and applications for U.S. permanent residency. She counsels organizations in a variety of industries including financial services, manufacturing, telecommunications, consulting, information technology, energy, and artificial intelligence.
Saleha received a Bachelor of Arts degree from York University, a Bachelor of Laws from the University of Windsor, Faculty of Law, and a Juris Doctor from the University of Detroit Mercy School of Law.
She is a dual-licensed lawyer and is called to the bar in Ontario (2014) and Michigan, USA (2025).
- Blog Post Trump’s “Gold Card”: The Price Tag on the American Dream and U.S. Permanent Residency December 5, 2025
- Blog Post Crossing Borders with Confidence: Summer Travel Tips for a Smooth Journey July 14, 2025
